Home / Service Areas / Hendersonville

Veterinarian in Hendersonville, NC

Trusted local professionals serving Hendersonville and surrounding communities

Serving Hendersonville, NC

Horizon Veterinarian is proud to serve Hendersonville, NC, and its surrounding areas. Our clinic offers comprehensive care, from routine wellness exams to advanced surgical procedures. Hendersonville's historic downtown and pet-friendly events make it a great place for pets and their owners. We're committed to providing the highest level of veterinary care to keep your pets healthy and happy.

Hendersonville is a vibrant town with a rich agricultural heritage.

Veterinarian Services in Hendersonville

Comprehensive Wellness Exams

Thorough check-ups to maintain your pet's health through all life stages.

Learn more →

Professional Dental Care

Complete dental services to prevent painful conditions and maintain overall health.

Learn more →

Senior Pet Health Management

Specialized care for aging pets to maintain comfort and quality of life.

Learn more →

Parasite Prevention & Control

Year-round protection against ticks, fleas, and other parasites common in WNC.

Learn more →

Nutritional Counseling

Personalized diet plans to support your pet's health needs and lifestyle.

Learn more →

Behavioral Consultations

Expert guidance for addressing anxiety, aggression, and other behavioral challenges.

Learn more →

Urgent & Emergency Care

Prompt attention for unexpected illnesses and injuries during business hours.

Learn more →

Need Veterinarian in Hendersonville?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Hendersonville and the surrounding area.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-vet-r90
